Bash(node -e "import\(''mongoose''\).then\(m => m.default.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI || ''mongodb+srv://vishaltiwari101999_db_user:vish2323@cluster0.bsi7jvp.mongodb.net/healthmap?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=Cluster0''\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''SUCCESS: MongoDB connected''\); process.exit\(0\) }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''FAILED:'', e.message\); process.exit\(1\) }\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/data/indianFoods.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''Foods:'', m.INDIAN_FOODS.length\); console.log\(''Conditions:'', Object.keys\(m.CONDITION_FOODS\)\); console.log\(''Meal plans:'', Object.keys\(m.MEAL_PLANS\)\); console.log\(''Search ragi:'', m.searchFoods\(''ragi''\).map\(f=>f.name\)\); console.log\(''Condition diabetes:'', m.getFoodsForCondition\(''diabetes''\).recommendedFoods.length, ''recommended''\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/services/aiService.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''AI Service loaded OK''\); console.log\(''Gemini configured:'', m.isGeminiConfigured\(\)\); console.log\(''Rate limit test:'', m.checkRateLimit\(''test123'', false\)\); console.log\(''Context builder:'', typeof m.buildFullHealthContext\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")
